title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 65.140 - Officers — notification of election
text:
65.140.  Officers — notification of election. — The township clerk shall, within ten days after such township election, transmit to each person elected to any township office a notice of his election.
(RSMo 1939 § 13951, A.L. 1978 H.B. 971) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12274; 1919 § 13187; 1909 § 11675
